name: jetbrains-router
description: Makes Claude read, search, and edit through your running JetBrains IDE instead of raw disk access. You get the IDE's live error detection without running builds, reads that see your unsaved editor changes, and searches that skip node_modules and other ignored paths via the project index. Auto-detects which IDE is running (WebStorm, IntelliJ IDEA, Rider, PyCharm, and friends) and fails open — everything works normally when no IDE is up. Requires JetBrains 2025.2+ with the MCP Server enabled. Tune via JETBRAINS_ROUTER_DISABLE, JETBRAINS_ROUTER_BYPASS, JETBRAINS_MCP_PREFIX.
